recommendations.recommendation: Keep output examples synchronized with actual implementation as code evolves; consider automated validation of sample outputs against real CLI behavior
Add exit codes to sample outputs (return 0 on success, 75 for rate-limit, etc.) for complete CLI documentation
Link output/result.md from main bop CLI help text or documentation index for discoverability
Create integration tests that verify actual command output matches documented samples, catching regressions early
